title: carex tricostata var. schummelii
intro: Carex tricostata var. schummelii, also known as Schumel's sedge, is a perennial plant species in the family Cyperaceae. It is often used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, respiratory infections, and skin conditions, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. In herbal preparations, Carex tricostata var. schummelii is commonly used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to benefit from its medicinal properties.
